patch_analysis: [FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/threadpool/ThreadPool.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['new FixedExecutorBuilder(settings, Names.FORCE_MERGE, oneEightOfProcessors(availableProcessors), -1),', '@Nullable', 'public ThreadPool.Info info(String name) {', 'ExecutorHolder holder = executors.get(name);', 'if (holder == null) {', 'return null;', '}', 'return holder.info();', '}', '', 'static int oneEightOfProcessors(int numberOfProcessors) {', 'return boundedBy(numberOfProcessors / 8, 1, Integer.MAX_VALUE);', '}', ''], removed_lines=['new FixedExecutorBuilder(settings, Names.FORCE_MERGE, 1, -1),'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)]
